---
title: "Practice - Tues Lecture"
format: html
theme: united
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)

```

```{r}
watershed_data <- read.csv(here("week2", "data", "p301.csv"))

data_final <- watershed_data |>
  group_by(wy) |>
  summarise(total_stream = sum(streamflow),
            total_precip = sum(precip),
            percent_stream_precip = (total_stream/total_precip)*100)
# calculate mean, range, and standard deviation of percent streamflow across all time

mean_percent <- mean(data_final$percent_stream_precip)
range_percent <- range(data_final$percent_stream_precip)
sd_percent <- sd(data_final$percent_stream_precip)

```
